h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it: the first response is the exhibit label-pin, showing whether the line has really changed office or is just copied ink.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to analyze the context of the repeated line to choose between the proposed caption verbs.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: [sets the copied line between the two excerpts and marks the margin: SAME INK, DIFFERENT OFFICE.] That label image gives the caption its test.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor adopts the learner's 'label' metaphor, physically marking it in the margin and using it to frame the testing of the caption verb.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.
